name_en: 🌈New Sade hobo is here! Black sheepskin material with a super soft texture 😎 Rhombus quilted sheepskin HOBO handbag LECASSANDRE. This fashionable and versatile handbag comes with a folding top handle and a detachable shoulder strap, offering multiple carrying ways. Equipped with a thin long chain. A small bag that fits a phone completely, can be carried by hand or crossbody, so exquisite!
name_cn:

 Shoulder strap length: 55cm
Model: 793608【Original Leather】
Size: 19x21x4cm
